creator: john@saltant.com
text: I still favor the path that tells the truth and requires action on the part of the user over the path that lies and requires nothing of the user. The BROKEN mechanism is not a perfect solution, but it appears to be the best one we have at the moment. It seems to me that poudriere has made a somewhat odd choice by silencing the helpful output from BROKEN. However, our first duty is to ports proper, and second (or later) to poudriere users.
